criteria_checks.comment: Scout detects technologies by file extensions and config files only. No hardcoded language logic.

criteria_checks.criterion: INV-3: Legacy/Greenfield parity — handles all project states
criteria_checks.comment: onboardProject pre-check classifies projects as clean, partial, foreign_system, mixed_system, compatible. Wizard offers onboarding for non-clean states.
Task registry updated. Artifacts stored in task directory.

criteria_checks.criterion: INV-6: Deterministic context — no implicit state
criteria_checks.comment: Subagents use clean sessions with --no-context-files. Context injected via task instruction.

criteria_checks.criterion: INV-12: Localization — Russian UI, English system docs
criteria_checks.comment: All operator-facing commands and notifications in Russian. System prompts and code comments in English. AGENTS.md passed localization guard.
scout.md prompt created. loom_run_scout tool spawns subagent and persists stack.json.
researcher.md prompt created. loom_run_researcher tool spawns subagent and persists context-research.json.
migrator.md prompt created. loom_run_migrator tool spawns subagent and persists migration-analysis.json.
Commands /rule-add, /rule-list. Tools loom_add_rule, loom_list_rules. Storage in knowledge/project/rules/.
Commands /arch-add, /arch-list. Tools loom_add_architecture_component, loom_list_architecture_components. Storage in knowledge/project/architecture/components/.
/loom-init expanded with pre-check, classification, and wizard. AGENTS.md generator tool added.

general_comments: DU-3 implementation is complete and covers all 6 implementation steps from plan.json.
Onboarding pipeline correctly handles greenfield and legacy projects.
All new schemas have runtime validators.
